jobs.title: Senior Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: A career as a Senior Data Analyst on the Business Intelligence and Commercial Analytics team at National Bank means acting as a specialist in data visualization and analysis. In this role, you will have a positive impact on our organization by leveraging your expertise in dashboard development, business intelligence, and user enablement. jobs.title: Senior Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: A career as a Senior Data Analyst within the Financial Crime team at National Bank means acting as a specialist in advanced analytics applied to fraud risk management. This role allows you to have a tangible and measurable impact on the organization through your expertise in modeling, data analysis, and data-driven decision-making, at the heart of high-impact initiatives for clients and operations. In this position, you contribute directly to reducing fraud-related losses, optimizing decision-m…

jobs.title: Vehicle Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: In your role as a Data Analysis Engineer, your primary mission will be managing and providing access to data related to the testing of our engineering vehicles. The data is automatically generated by our instrumentation team, and you will work closely with engineering teams to develop or improve the tools needed to access and display test data. YOU’LL HAVE THE OPPORTUNITY TO: Be responsible for the physical test reports currently used by various engineering teams; Hold the keys to the available…

jobs.title: Data Analyst / Business Intelligence Specialist
jobs.descriptionSnippet: We are seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Business Analyst to join our team. This role is critical in driving data-driven decision-making across the global Evinrude Parts and Oil business. The ideal candidate will have strong technical skills in data analysis, visualization, and pricing strategy, along with the ability to translate complex data into actionable insights.
